name: parentheses-licence
description: Release engineering workspace for Parentheses Licence.

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.test: npm --prefix backend test && npm --prefix frontend test
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix backend run typecheck && npm --prefix frontend run typecheck
scripts.security:check: npm --prefix backend audit --audit-level=high && npm --prefix frontend audit --audit-level=high
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run test && npm run verify:release
scripts.verify:release: npm run verify:workflows && node scripts/generate-release-summary.js && node scripts/generate-enterprise-certification.js
